ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rsi_bands" (
  "rsi_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSI band */,
  "rsi_band_name" TEXT /* Name of the RSI band (e.g., Below 55) */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the RSI band */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the RSI band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the RSI band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsi_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "rsi_band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RSI band the trade belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades in the RSI band */,
  "num_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winning trades in the RSI band */,
  "num_losers" INTEGER /* Number of losing trades in the RSI band */,
  "wl_ratio" REAL /* Win-loss ratio of the RSI band */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the trade */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the trade occurred */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_rsi_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("rsi_band_id") REFERENCES rsi_bands ("rsi_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the stock exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock exchange information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the trade belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades in the stock exchange */,
  "num_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winning trades in the stock exchange */,
  "num_losers" INTEGER /* Number of losing trades in the stock exchange */,
  "wl_ratio" REAL /* Win-loss ratio of the stock exchange */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id", "exchange_id")
)
